name: Hölscher Holding
message: Hölscher Holding specializes in consulting, planning, and implementing storage and logistics systems, making it a leading providerin Europe.We are ready to upload 24 GB of corporate documents. Top management and other employees (including foreigners) personal documents,customer information (DOB, address and so on), detailed financials, project data, customers information, contracts and agreementsBMW, Ford, MAN, Mercedes and other big names, NDAs, etc.
